## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly pod catch-up to discuss ongoing projects, processes, and updates across the team.](https://fathom.video/share/t16LuTZRP8-wH9Ssc-zx-oRq8_42ysyE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways
